# Requirements Clarity & Scenario Coverage Checklist: Carfax Scraper MCP Tools

**Purpose**: Validate requirement clarity and scenario-class coverage before task generation.
**Created**: 2026-04-14
**Feature**: /home/runner/work/car-auctions/car-auctions/specs/003-carfax-scraper-mcp-tools/spec.md

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK001 Are the inclusion rules for report fields marked “when available” explicitly defined so omissions are unambiguous? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK002 Is `overall_risk_rating` defined with explicit scoring thresholds or decision logic? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK003 Are “retry metadata where applicable” conditions and required metadata fields precisely specified? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK004 Is “daily cap exhaustion” quantified with source, threshold, and reset semantics? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK005 Are stale-response requirements clear about behavior when no cached entry exists during upstream failure? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK006 Is the cache freshness model fully specified (clock source, expiry boundary behavior, and VIN normalization for cache keys)? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK007 Are typed error boundaries clear enough to distinguish when each error type MUST be used versus MUST NOT be used? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009; Contract §Standard Envelope]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK008 Are complete primary-flow requirements defined for both tools from validated input through successful response payload shaping? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1-2; Spec §FR-002-004]
- [ ] CHK009 Are alternate-flow requirements complete for cache-hit versus scrape-needed paths for both tools? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1 Scenario 2; Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK010 Are exception-flow requirements complete for invalid VIN, CAPTCHA, HTTP 403/429, and upstream failures across both tools? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3; Spec §FR-002, FR-006, FR-008]
- [ ] CHK011 Are recovery-flow requirements specified for Carfax session expiry and re-authentication outcomes (success, retry, terminal failure)? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK012 Are partial-data requirements defined for missing report sections and their effect on summary derivation outputs? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §Edge Cases; Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK013 Are no-fallback requirements defined for rate-limit or upstream-failure cases when stale cache is absent? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-006, FR-008]
- [ ] CHK014 Are observability scenario requirements defined for both success and each error class (required attributes and status values)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-010; Contract §Cross-Cutting Contract Rules]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK015 Are success criteria for response validity measurable with explicit schema conformance expectations per tool? [Acceptance Criteria, Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK016 Is the “no downstream network call” criterion measurable with a specified observability/audit signal? [Acceptance Criteria, Clarity, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK017 Are performance criteria scoped for both cached and non-cached paths with explicit measurement conditions? [Acceptance Criteria, Gap, Spec §SC-003; Plan §Performance Goals]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK018 Are requirement statements aligned between FR-009 typed-error constraints and contract guidance on stack-trace suppression to avoid conflicting error payload expectations? [Consistency, Spec §FR-009; Contract §Cross-Cutting Contract Rules]
- [ ] CHK019 Is the requirement to “follow existing envelope conventions” reconciled with any package-specific deviations to prevent hidden assumptions? [Assumption, Ambiguity, Spec §Assumptions]
